commands.repair_reason: Human-only proof review is still needed; there is no narrow code repair for automation while the patch itself has no blocking findings.; Cleared: The diff only changes local middleware result handling and focused tests; it adds no dependencies, workflows, credential handling, network fetches, or broader execution surface. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a message-send-specific middleware fallback that preserves minimal delivery details when tool-result middleware fails after a successful send.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main runs message delivery before tool-result middleware, Slack send returns nested details.result identifiers, and middleware exceptions currently replace the delivered result with the generic failure sentinel.
commands.review_followup: Human-only proof review is still needed; there is no narrow code repair for automation while the patch itself has no blocking findings.
